description: Being compact and easy-to-produce, the Quail-class is a cheaper alternative to the mainstay miner-freighters in N+S' fleet. Outfitted for minor salvage and mining operations, this vessel is focused on finding and poaching smaller and generally less lucrative material POIs, such as strip-mining, low-tier core sampling, and light salvage. Compared to its larger sister vessel(s), the Quail-class is a vulture among hawks, smaller, more agile, and, at often times, an opportunistic hunter or scavenger.
